title: Damage Over Time
description: Applies defined amount of damage to the entity at specified intervals.

damage_per_hurt.title: Damage Per Hurt
damage_per_hurt.description:
Amount of damage caused each hurt.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 1

time_between_hurt.title: Time Between Hurt
time_between_hurt.description:
Time in seconds between damage.

Sample values:
• vex: 1
